title: Context7
description: Up-to-date documentation and code examples pulled directly from libraries and frameworks. Keeps LLM context accurate and version-aware.

Find Tailwind CSS v4 migration guide
Get the current Next.js App Router docs

title: GitHub
description: Interact with GitHub repositories, issues, pull requests, and more. Search code, manage workflows, and automate GitHub tasks.
examples: Search for open issues labeled 'bug' in my repo
Create a pull request with a summary
List recent commits on the main branch

title: Sentry
description: Access error tracking and performance monitoring data from Sentry. Search issues, view stack traces, and analyze error trends.
examples: Show me the most frequent unresolved errors
Get the stack trace for issue PROJ-1234
List errors from the last 24 hours

title: Grep by Vercel
description: Search across millions of open source repositories on GitHub. Find code patterns, usage examples, and implementation references.
examples: Find examples of useOptimistic hook usage
Search for Stripe webhook handler patterns
Look up GraphQL resolver implementations

title: Brave Search
description: Web and local search powered by Brave. Get real-time search results, news, and local business information without tracking.
examples: Search for the latest Node.js security advisories
Find restaurants near the office
Look up the current AWS status page

title: Linear
description: Manage issues, projects, and cycles in Linear. Create tickets, update statuses, and track project progress directly from your AI assistant.
examples: Create a bug report for the login page crash
List my assigned issues in the current sprint
Update ticket ENG-456 status to In Review

title: Figma
description: Read and inspect Figma design files. Extract layout information, design tokens, and component properties to assist with implementation.
examples: Get the color palette from the design system file
Inspect the spacing of the header component
List all text styles used in the project

title: Supabase
description: Manage Supabase projects, databases, and edge functions. Run SQL queries, manage auth settings, and interact with the Supabase platform.
examples: List all tables in my database
Run a SQL query to count active users
Create a new edge function

title: Cloudflare
description: Manage Cloudflare Workers, KV stores, R2 buckets, and DNS settings. Deploy and monitor your Cloudflare infrastructure.
examples: List all Workers in my account
Deploy a new KV namespace
Check DNS records for my domain

title: Browserbase
description: Cloud browser automation for web scraping, testing, and interaction. Navigate pages, extract content, and take screenshots.
examples: Take a screenshot of our production homepage
Extract all product prices from this page
Fill out and submit a test form

title: Neon Postgres
description: Manage Neon serverless Postgres databases. Create branches, run queries, and manage database schemas with AI assistance.
examples: Create a new database branch for testing
Run a migration to add a users table
Show me the current schema for the orders table

title: Stripe
description: Interact with Stripe payment infrastructure. Manage customers, view transactions, create payment links, and query billing data.
examples: List recent failed payments
Look up customer by email
Create a payment link for $49.99

title: Slack
description: Read and send messages in Slack channels. Search conversations, manage channels, and automate team communication workflows.
examples: Post a deployment notification to #engineering
Search for messages about the API outage
List all channels I'm a member of

title: Notion
description: Access and manage Notion workspaces, pages, and databases. Search content, create pages, and update database entries.
examples: Search for meeting notes from last week
Create a new project brief page
Update the status of items in the tasks database

title: Vercel
description: Manage Vercel deployments, projects, and environment variables. Monitor builds, check deployment status, and configure project settings.
examples: List recent deployments for my project
Check the build logs for the latest deploy
Add an environment variable to production
